summary: Complete testing of Customers page and Customer Detail page. 26/29 backend tests pass (3 minor failures due to test data from previous iterations). All frontend UI flows working correctly including search, filters, customer table, customer detail page with timeline, notes, risk breakdown, and PEP badges.

minor.issue: Some non-demo customers (from previous test iterations) missing kyc_status field - not a bug, just incomplete test data
Some non-demo customers missing risk_breakdown field - not a bug, just incomplete test data
Some low-risk non-demo customers have standard_cdd instead of sdd - data consistency issue from manual customer creation

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/customers returns paginated list with 28+ customers
Backend: GET /api/customers with risk_level=high filter returns only high risk customers
Backend: GET /api/customers with risk_level=low filter returns only low risk customers
Backend: GET /api/customers with kyc_status=verified filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/customers with nationality=IN filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/customers with search=Rajendra returns matching customers
Backend: Pagination with skip and limit works correctly
Backend: 3 PEP match customers exist (Rajendra Prasad Yadav, Smt. Laxmi Devi Sharma, Balakrishnan Nair Pillai)
Backend: Rajendra Prasad Yadav is PEP match with risk 72
Backend: Smt. Laxmi Devi Sharma is PEP match with risk 65
Backend: Balakrishnan Nair Pillai is PEP match with risk 78
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id} returns customer details
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id} returns 404 for invalid ID
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/timeline returns timeline events
Backend: Timeline events have required fields (id, customer_id, event_type, label, timestamp)
Backend: PEP customer timeline includes pep_match event
Backend: PEP customer timeline includes case_opened event
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/notes returns notes list
Backend: POST /api/customers/{id}/notes creates new note
Backend: Added note persists and appears in GET notes
Backend: POST /api/customers/{id}/notes with empty text returns 400
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/screenings returns screenings list
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/screenings returns 404 for invalid customer
Backend: CDD tiers are valid (sdd, standard_cdd, edd)
Backend: High risk customers have EDD tier
Frontend: Login with shyam@sentrixai.com / Sentrix@2024 works
Frontend: Customers page shows 'Customers' title with total count
Frontend: Customers table displays with columns: Name, ID Type, KYC Status, Risk Level, Last Screened, CDD Tier, Actions
Frontend: KYC Status shows icons (Verified=green checkmark, Pending=yellow clock, Failed=red X)
Frontend: Risk Level shows color badges (LOW=green, MEDIUM=yellow, HIGH=red)
Frontend: CDD Tier shows badges (SDD=green, STANDARD=blue, EDD=red)
Frontend: Search bar filters customers by name
Frontend: Filters panel opens with Risk Level, KYC Status, Country dropdowns
Frontend: Filter by Risk Level=high shows only high risk customers (3 results)
Frontend: Filter by KYC Status=verified shows only verified customers
Frontend: Clear filters button works
Frontend: Click customer row navigates to /customers/{id} detail page
Frontend: Customer detail header shows name, avatar, risk score circle (SVG), badges
Frontend: PEP MATCH badge displayed for PEP customers (purple)
Frontend: SANCTIONS MATCH badge displayed for sanctions match customers (red)
Frontend: Activity Timeline shows vertical timeline with colored icons
Frontend: PEP Match Found event shown in red for PEP customers
Frontend: Investigation Case Opened event shown in red for PEP customers
Frontend: Documents section displays uploaded documents with verification status
Frontend: Risk Score Breakdown shows visual bars for each risk factor
Frontend: Risk breakdown includes: KYC, Sanctions, PEP, Adverse Media, Country Risk, Occupation Risk
Frontend: Internal Notes section shows existing notes
Frontend: Note input and send button work correctly
Frontend: Adding note persists and displays immediately
Frontend: Rajendra Prasad Yadav detail page shows risk 72, PEP MATCH, MLA Bihar position
Frontend: Smt. Laxmi Devi Sharma detail page shows risk 65, PEP MATCH, Cabinet Minister Rajasthan
Frontend: Balakrishnan Nair Pillai detail page shows risk 78, PEP MATCH, SANCTIONS MATCH, Former Secretary Ministry of Finance
seed_data_creation: 25 demo customers seeded on startup with realistic Indian names. 3 PEP matches: Rajendra Prasad Yadav (MLA Bihar, risk 72), Smt. Laxmi Devi Sharma (Cabinet Minister Rajasthan, risk 65), Balakrishnan Nair Pillai (Former Secretary Ministry of Finance, risk 78). Timeline events, documents, and notes also seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers page fully tested. Features verified: Customer list with 28+ customers, search by name, filters (Risk Level, KYC Status, Country), pagination, customer detail page with header (name, avatar, risk score circle, badges), activity timeline with colored icons, documents section, risk score breakdown with visual bars, internal notes with add functionality. 3 PEP match customers verified with correct risk scores and timeline events (PEP Match Found, Investigation Case Opened in red). Backend endpoints: GET /api/customers (paginated, filterable), GET /api/customers/{id}, GET /api/customers/{id}/timeline, GET /api/customers/{id}/notes, POST /api/customers/{id}/notes, GET /api/customers/{id}/screenings. Signzy KYC and OpenSanctions are MOCKED in demo mode.

mocked_apis.signzy_service.py: KYC verification (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, DL) returns mock results

header.name: Full name displayed
header.risk_score_circle: SVG with 0-100 score, color-coded by level
